description_long: This armchair features a broad, inviting seat with plush, light tan upholstery and a gently curved backrest that provides ample support. The armrests are wide and padded, seamlessly integrated into the chair's frame, and curve outward in a modern, sculptural style. The upholstery displays a subtle diamond-quilted pattern, adding a touch of elegance and texture to the overall appearance. The chair sits on four short, sturdy wooden legs with a dark finish, slightly splayed for stability. The back of the chair is fully upholstered and slightly reclined, offering comfort and a cohesive look from all angles. This armchair would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A plush, tan armchair with wide, padded armrests, diamond-quilted upholstery, and short wooden legs. Its modern, curved design offers both comfort and visual appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, padded armrests, and the full, curved backrest with diamond-quilted upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outward curve of the armrest, the reclined backrest, and the thickness of the cushioning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered back and the dark wooden legs, with the backrest's gentle curve visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and backrest curvature, and showing the chair's depth and padding.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and upholstered with a gentle outward curve
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, curved, and fully upholstered with subtle quilting
